universalMessages: Your care helps students feel steady, known, and ready.
Thank you for protecting dignity in every conversation.
Your patience turns hard days into possible days.
Inclusion grows because people like you keep showing up.
Every thoughtful adjustment matters more than people realize.
You make school feel more human.
Your work changes the shape of a student's day.

guests.name: Maria Santos
guests.signature: With deep appreciation from the Special Education team
messages: Maria, your calm presence gives families a place to breathe.
Students are safer to try because you notice the smallest wins.
Your meetings make complicated supports feel clear and kind.
You bring both structure and warmth to every plan.

guests.name: Jordan Lee
guests.signature: With deep appreciation from the Special Education team
messages: Jordan, your advocacy keeps students' futures in the room.
You turn services into real pathways for real young people.
Your follow-through is quiet, consistent, and deeply valuable.
Families trust you because you listen before you solve.

guests.name: Anya Patel
guests.signature: With deep appreciation from the Special Education team
messages: Anya, you make early support feel hopeful instead of heavy.
Your kindness helps young learners build brave first steps.
You see communication in gestures, routines, smiles, and effort.
Your classroom visits leave people with practical courage.
